name: Thalassa Voulgaris
summary: Detail-oriented Data Engineer with 5 years of experience in building scalable ETL pipelines and optimizing cloud-based data warehouses. Proven track record in improving data quality and reducing latency for large-scale analytical platforms.

experience.title: Data Engineer
experience.description: Architected and maintained robust data pipelines using Apache Airflow and Python, resulting in a 30% increase in data processing efficiency for client dashboards.

experience.title: Junior Data Engineer
experience.description: Developed complex SQL queries for financial reporting and automated data ingestion from multiple REST APIs into Snowflake.

experience.title: Data Analyst
experience.description: Collaborated with cross-functional teams to clean and transform raw datasets, supporting business intelligence initiatives with automated reporting tools.
